subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the Incomparable Wronged One, Whom they have rejected [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لهو المظلوم الفرید قد انکره
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @development of capacity and readiness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
